title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Law, Kid as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bastard is apparently facing big mom now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet he sees this as his chance to finally support an emperor... He sure dreams big.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can always cut me down with those scythes if you're sick of me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TCH... I still don't mind if you surrender...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll even put in a good word with Kaido for you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your side has no chance of winning this battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You already know that's the truth, don't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The reason their Dominion over seas has lasted for so long...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is obvious to anyone who has laid eyes on them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see through your wailing. You regret it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We fought through the impossible odds you foresaw,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we're still here while you pissed yourself...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll accept you into the fold if you submit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll see who made the right decision when this is over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well... I don't wanna have regrets either...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So I'm gonna give this another shot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's all or nothing now... huff, huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've just thought of a couple of questions for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What happens if you take damage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That has no where else to go?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?! You should under-stand my powers by now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?! You should understand my powers by now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'm not sure what I'm doing," said the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: you... you cut off my arm?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: How many more lives do you have?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Damn it!! This isn't what I predicted...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're already living on borrowed time. I'm going to finish you head on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Show me the result of this battle!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's fate is determined by the cards... and it will be revived!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 60 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
